title: Today Senator Suzette Martinez Valladares (R-Santa Clarita) announced that her bipartisan legislation to address her priority issue areas of affordability, public safety and expand
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: SB 296 aims to exempt the primary residences of 100% disabled veterans from property taxes.
AB 30 will allow a more cost-efficient and environmentally friendly E15 blend of gasoline to be sold in California.
SB 571 seeks to protect victims from opportunistic criminals during a state of emergency by increasing penalties for looting or impersonating first responders.
SB 563 would expand access to needed grant funds for law enforcement who patrol mixed terrain areas throughout California.
SB 508 expands healthcare access for cancer patients who need it most.
SB 630 and AB 1138 help keep good paying jobs in California by providing incentives for TV and film production.
